final:
module  omsp_and_gate (
    y,                         
    a,                         
    b                          
);
output         y;              
input          a;              
input          b;              
assign  y  =  a & b;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (a || b) begin
        y <= ~y;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
